---
title: "Readings"
---

### Readings for June 25

- Alarid-Escudero F, et al. *A need for change! A coding framework for improving transparency in decision modeling.* Pharmacoeconomics (2019).  
  <https://doi.org/10.1007/s40273-019-00837-x>

- Alarid-Escudero F, et al. *An introductory tutorial on cohort state-transition models in R...* Medical Decision Making (2022).  
  <https://doi.org/10.1177/0272989X221103163>
  
### Readings for June 26

- Krijkamp EM, Alarid-Escudero F, Enns EA, Jalal HJ, Hunink MM, Pechlivanoglou P. *Microsimulation modeling for health decision sciences using R: A tutorial.* Medical Decision Making (2018).  
  <https://doi.org/10.1177/0272989X18754513>

### Readings for June 27

- Briggs AH, Weinstein MC, Fenwick E, et al. *Model parameter estimation and uncertainty analysis: a report of the ISPOR-SMDM modeling good research practices task force-6.* Value in Health (2012).  
  <https://doi.org/10.1177/0272989x12458348>
